official_sources.surface: Aster Spot API and Futures V3 API
official_sources.evidence: Aster has separate spot and futures API surfaces; this adapter currently wires Futures V3 perpetual REST/WS runtime.

runtime_isolation: Keep Aster spot separate from the futures V3 runtime until spot REST/WS hosts, listen-key flow and account scope are verified.
remaining_work: pin spot exchangeInfo, depth, ticker and trades specs
add signed spot account, order, open-order and fill fixtures
wire spot listen-key/private stream reconciliation and product-scope guards
